name: ollama-codex
description: The missing Codex plugin GUI for configuring Codex App and Codex CLI with Ollama.

interface.shortDescription: Add a GUI and slash-command layer for Ollama in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Ollama can already work with Codex, but discovery is low and the command surface is tedious to remember. Ollama for Codex gives Ollama a visual, reversible home in Codex: starter prompts, slash commands, status checks, dry runs, model helpers, and explicit restore flows. For Codex App, run `ollama launch codex-app`, switch to a local or Ollama Cloud model with `ollama launch codex-app --model <model>`, and restore the previous App profile with `ollama launch codex-app --restore`. For Codex CLI, run `ollama launch codex`, configure without launching via `ollama launch codex --config`, restore via `ollama launch codex --restore`, run manually with `codex --oss`, use a specific local or cloud model with `codex --oss -m <model>`, or use the generated `ollama-launch` profile with `codex --profile ollama-launch`. The plugin preserves App/CLI profile separation and delegates configuration to Ollama instead of hand-editing Codex config files.
defaultPrompt: Set up Codex App with Ollama
Switch Codex App to an Ollama model
Run Codex CLI with an Ollama model
